name: Non-Recycled Waste
businessDefinition:
Tons of non-recycled waste generated. "Non-recycled waste" means any waste not recycled within the meaning of ‘recycling’ in Article 3(17) of Directive 2008/98/EC. See Regulation (EU) 2022/1288, Annex I, top (17).
Linked to Regulation (EU) 2022/1288, Annex I, Table 2, Adverse impact on sustainability factor 13
